ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "home_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistics belong to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the statistics were recorded in */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "w" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "l" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "w_pct" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "min" REAL /* Minutes played */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "fg3m" INTEGER /* 3-point field goals made */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* 3-point field goals attempted */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* 3-point field goal percentage */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "blk_against" INTEGER /* Blocks against */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pfd" INTEGER /* Personal fouls drawn */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Plus/minus */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins at home */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins away */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank in the division */,
  "points_allowed" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the statistics were recorded in */,
  "gp" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "gs" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "min" REAL /* Minutes played */,
  "fgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made */,
  "fga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "fg3m" INTEGER /* 3-point field goals made */,
  "fg3a" INTEGER /* 3-point field goals attempted */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* 3-point field goal percentage */,
  "ftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made */,
  "fta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "oreb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds */,
  "dreb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "tov" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "stl" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blk" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "blk_against" INTEGER /* Blocks against */,
  "pf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls */,
  "pfd" INTEGER /* Personal fouls drawn */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored */,
  "efficiency_rating" REAL /* Overall efficiency rating */,
  "true_shooting_pct" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "rebound_pct" REAL /* Rebound percentage */,
  "assist_pct" REAL /* Assist percentage */,
  "steal_pct" REAL /* Steal percentage */,
  "block_pct" REAL /* Block percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Name of the team's home arena
Name of the team's head coach
Unique identifier for each statistical entry
ID of the team the statistics belong to
Season the statistics were recorded in
Total points allowed by the team
ID of the team the player belongs to
Height of the player in inches
Weight of the player in pounds
Date of birth of the player
Current contract status of the player
Unique identifier for each statistical entry
ID of the player the statistics belong to
Season the statistics were recorded in
